						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448150_816453_37681'>
							<body>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; standalone=&quot;yes&quot;?&gt;
&lt;unionExpressionSpecification xmlns=&quot;http://www.nomagic.com/schemas/MagicDraw/StructuredExpression/2013&quot;&gt;
    &lt;taggedValues&gt;
        &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
            &lt;value&gt;Condition&lt;/value&gt;
        &lt;/entry&gt;
        &lt;entry key=&quot;ROOT_UNION&quot;&gt;
            &lt;value&gt;true&lt;/value&gt;
        &lt;/entry&gt;
    &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
    &lt;value xsi:type=&quot;callExpressionSpecification&quot; xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;&gt;
        &lt;taggedValues&gt;
            &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
                &lt;value&gt;Script1&lt;/value&gt;
            &lt;/entry&gt;
        &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
        &lt;argument xsi:type=&quot;callExpressionSpecification&quot;&gt;
            &lt;taggedValues&gt;
                &lt;entry key=&quot;name&quot;&gt;
                    &lt;value&gt;Metachain Navigation1&lt;/value&gt;
                &lt;/entry&gt;
            &lt;/taggedValues&gt;
            &lt;argument xsi:type=&quot;lookupExpressionSpecification&quot; symbol=&quot;THIS&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;expression xsi:type=&quot;metaChainExpressionSpecification&quot;&gt;
                &lt;chain xsi:type=&quot;stereotypeProperty&quot; profile=&quot;SysML&quot; stereotype=&quot;Requirement&quot; tag=&quot;SatisfiedBy&quot; derived=&quot;false&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;/expression&gt;
        &lt;/argument&gt;
        &lt;expression xsi:type=&quot;makeInlineExpressionSpecification&quot; language=&quot;JavaScript&quot;&gt;
            &lt;parameter name=&quot;arg1&quot; type=&quot;java.lang.Object&quot; ordered=&quot;false&quot; unique=&quot;false&quot; multiple=&quot;false&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;body&gt;arg1.size()&amp;gt;0&lt;/body&gt;
        &lt;/expression&gt;
    &lt;/value&gt;
&lt;/unionExpressionSpecification&gt;
</body>

            &lt;body&gt;arg1.contains(&quot;Water&quot;) ||      arg1.contains(&quot;Steam&quot;)&lt;/body&gt;
        &lt;/expression&gt;
    &lt;/value&gt;
&lt;/unionExpressionSpecification&gt;
</body>

	<DSL_Customization:NumberOwner xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960440867_610512_37124' base_Element='_18_5_9250292_1480960440765_17768_36939'>
		<customNumberingData>Multi-levelɲɪɳtrueɲɪɳfalseɲɪɳSRɲɪɳɲɪɳ1ɲɪɳ_17_0_4beta_1b3a0482_1355297412593_609711_22854ɲɪɳ_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147873236436_846958_2313ɲɪɳ_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147873190330_159934_2220ɲɪɳtrue</customNumberingData>
	</DSL_Customization:NumberOwner>
	<MagicDraw_Profile:DiagramInfo xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1481457889622_768828_34871' base_Diagram='_18_5_9250292_1481457889598_810949_34808' Creation_date='16.12.11 14.04' Modification_date='16.12.11 14.15' Author='osvjan' Last_modified_by='osvjan'/>
	<MagicDraw_Profile:DiagramInfo xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448126_558778_37578' base_Diagram='_18_5_9250292_1480960440800_539147_37039' Creation_date='16.12.5 19.54' Modification_date='16.12.19 07.56' Author='osvjan' Last_modified_by='osvjan'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448148_238754_37669' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448123_285232_37567' Id='SR1.7' Text='The Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) shall control acceleration and braking of the vehicle. ACC shall detect traffic slowing ahead and automatically reduce speed to match. '/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448148_625084_37668' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448122_158594_37566' Id='SR1.2' Text='When braking, the electric motor shall switch to generator mode. The wheels shall transfer kinetic energy via the drivetrain to the generator.&#10;Generator resistance produced from the electricity created shall slow the vehicle.'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448125_370305_37574' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960440794_979045_37037' Text='Requirements of HSUV System Requirements.' Id='SR1'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448148_117862_37670' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448123_247713_37568' Id='SR1.3' Text='These requirements describe the cooperative regenerative braking system safety requirements.' risk='High'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_926067_37674' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448125_815500_37572' Id='SR1.3.2' Text='The vehicle shall completely stop from 100 km per hour in less than 30 meters.' risk='High'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_926067_37674application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448125_815500_37572' status='Closed'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_1505_37673' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448124_460487_37571' Id='SR1.3.3' Text='Friction braking at 100 km per hour shall not generate more than 55 kW of heat at each wheel.' risk='High'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_1505_37673application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448124_460487_37571' status='Disapproved'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448148_187026_37671' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448124_381724_37569' Id='SR1.5' Text='The vehicle shall emit less than 50 grams of carbon dioxide (CO₂) per kilometre driven.' risk='Low'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448148_187026_37671application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448124_381724_37569' status='Disapproved'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448150_86715_37678' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448125_23043_37573' Id='SR1.6' Text='Requirements of distances on different modes'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448150_86715_37678application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448125_23043_37573' status='In Progress'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448927_878002_37888' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_642517_37675' Id='SR1.6.2' Text='The vehicle shall drive at least 200 km on full charge electric-only propulsion mode and shall be charged in less than 150 minutes.' risk='Low'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448927_878002_37888application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_642517_37675' status='In Progress'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448927_345011_37889' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_647719_37676' Id='SR1.6.3' Text='The vehicle should be charged in less than 30 minutes and it should be possible to drive at least 70 km.' risk='Medium'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448927_345011_37889application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_647719_37676' status='In Progress'/>
	<MagicDraw_Profile:Legend xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448126_698246_37577' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960440794_890338_37038'/>
	<MagicDraw_Profile:deprecated xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_934345_37672' base_Element='_18_5_9250292_1480960448124_620962_37570'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_934345_37672application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448124_620962_37570' Id='SR1.4' Text='ACC shall bring the vehicle to a complete stop if the barrier appears.' risk='High'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448149_934345_37672application2' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448124_620962_37570' status='Approved'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448927_540385_37890' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448150_957829_37677' Id='SR1.6.4' Text='The vehicle shall drive at least 1000 km on hybrid mode.' risk='Low'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480960448927_540385_37890application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480960448150_957829_37677' status='In Progress'/>
	<MagicDraw_Profile:Legend xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1481980113371_800274_28370' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1481980113371_30796_28369'/>
	<sysml:extendedRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480961124989_318569_41868' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480961124988_363378_41867' Id='SR1.1' Text='The total vehicle mass shall not exceed 1500 Kg.' risk='Low'/>
	<Profile:customRequirement xmi:id='_18_5_9250292_1480961124989_318569_41868application1' base_Class='_18_5_9250292_1480961124988_363378_41867' status='Approved'/>
